title: onobrychis geminiflora
intro: Onobrychis geminiflora, also known as two-flowered birdsfoot trefoil, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, and has been traditionally used to treat conditions like gastrointestinal disorders and skin issues. Onobrychis geminiflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and teas, as well as being used in traditional medicine and as a food supplement.
